title: bis / fx markets / interest rate derivatives | Research Paper | BIS Quarterly Review, December 2025
summary: The BIS Quarterly Review December 2025 presents comprehensive analysis of international banking and financial market developments, with particular focus on FX market structure following the April 2025 Triennial Survey, the continuing transition away from Libor in interest rate derivatives markets, and the growing role of basis trading strategies. The publication documents structural shifts including a surge in FX trading volumes driven by hedging activity amid global monetary policy uncertainty, and uneven progress in emerging market FX and derivatives market development.
